title: Wisp Of Life
description: Replaces Totem of Undying with the Life Wisp from Origin Realms
body:
## Replaces Totem of Undying with the Life Wisp from [Origin Realms](https://originrealms.com/)
![Icon used for the pack](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/af2f80e08453be71ce9c7df2d6b03fad9df43147.png)
## This **Pack** is not affiliated with [Piston Solutions](https://jobs.piston.gg/933a071e9c4546a89de80493e485e016) the creators of [Origin Realms](https://originrealms.com/)

If you encounter any bugs hit me up on Discord (loogicarry) or my [Twitter](https://x.com/LoogiCarry), where you can also check out my other work

DO NOT REUPLOAD / REDISTRIBUTE THE PACK
